label: Vocabulary
description: Lexical knowledge. Sub-tree per language. Within each language, events are organised per lemma (one bucket per word) with aspects per lemma (translation, gender, plural, class, auxiliary). Per-word and per-aspect buckets are not pre-registered; the housing aggregates them dynamically under the language-level group as events come in.

label: Italian vocabulary
description: Italian words a learner has met, with sub-buckets per aspect (translation, gender, plural, class, auxiliary, etc.). Buckets like `vocabulary.it.casa.translation` and `vocabulary.it.andare.auxiliary` fire here when the learner asks for vocab help or when the AI marker observes a vocab gap.

label: English vocabulary
description: English words on the source side of EN to IT translations. Used when the source-side help is itself a vocabulary question (rare; English source words are usually known by the learner).
